source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the figure, square $WXYZ$ has a diagonal of 12 units. Point $A$ is a midpoint of segment $WX$, segment $AB$ is perpendicular to segment $AC$ and $AB = AC.$ What is the length of segment $BC$? <image1>
